description_long: This object is a large, square wooden crate with a robust, reinforced frame and visible wood grain texture across all sides. The crate features deep, carved lines simulating planks and panels, with slightly beveled edges and a recessed central panel on each face. The coloration is a warm, medium brown with darker streaks and knots, giving it a weathered, rustic appearance. There are no visible handles, latches, or openings, and the top appears to be solid and flush with the frame. The corners are slightly rounded, and the wood texture is consistent throughout, suggesting it is constructed from the same material on all sides. This crate would typically be found in urban environments such as alleys, storage yards, or garages, serving as a container or storage unit.
description: A large, square wooden crate with a weathered brown finish, reinforced frame, and visible wood grain texture. It has recessed panels and no visible handles or markings.
description_view_0: Front view shows a prominent wood grain pattern with a recessed central panel and a small metallic detail in the upper left corner.
description_view_1: This side displays a smoother wood texture with less pronounced grain and no visible metallic details.
description_view_2: Similar to the front, this view has a strong wood grain pattern and a small metallic detail in the upper left corner.
description_view_3: This side is plain with a subtle wood grain and no metallic details, appearing more uniform than the other views.
